constraint.description: The groupId for jQAssistant plugin Maven projects must follow the pattern 'org.jqassistant.plugin.<project>'.

concept.description: Labels all Maven projects which declare "org.jqassistant.plugin:parent" as parent module with "Parent".

constraint.description: All Maven projects must define the same groupId as the parent of the plugin project.
At least one developer must be specified in the "developers" section of the parent pom.xml of a plugin project.
A SCM section having both connection and developerConnection set to "scm:git:https://github.com/jqassistant-plugin/_repository-name_" must be specified in the parent pom.xml of a plugin project.
The project URL must be defined in the parent pom.xml of a plugin project.

concept.description: Finds all test methods (i.e. annotated with "@org.junit.jupiter.api.ParameterizedTest") and labels them with "Test", "Parameterized", and "Junit5".
Finds all test methods (i.e. annotated with "@org.junit.jupiter.api.Test") and labels them with "Test" and "Junit5".
Labels all methods annotated by "@org.junit.jupiter.api.TestTemplate" with "Junit5", "Test" and "Template".
Finds all test methods (i.e. annotated with "@org.junit.jupiter.api.RepeatedTest") and labels them with "Test", "Repeated", and "Junit5".
Labels all classes containing test methods with "Test" and "Junit5".

column.name: TestMethods
column.value: void statelessSessionBean(java.lang.Class), void statefulSessionBean(java.lang.Class), void singletonBean(java.lang.Class), void messageDrivenBean(java.lang.Class), void localSessionBean(java.lang.Class), void remoteSessionBean(java.lang.Class), void providedConceptEjb(java.lang.Class[],java.lang.Class[]), void scheduleMethod(java.lang.Class), void ejbInjectable(java.lang.Class[],java.lang.Class[]), void providedConceptJeeInjectable(java.lang.Class[],java.lang.Class[]), void scheduleMethodWithoutEjb_No_Violation(java.lang.Class), void scheduleMethodWithoutEjb(java.lang.Class)

column.name: TestMethods
column.value: void dependent(java.lang.Class), void requestScoped(java.lang.Class), void sessionScoped(java.lang.Class), void conversationScoped(java.lang.Class), void applicationScoped(java.lang.Class), void singletonScoped(java.lang.Class), void stereotype(java.lang.Class), void alternative(java.lang.Class), void specializes(java.lang.Class), void qualifier(java.lang.Class), void produces(java.lang.Class), void producesUnique(java.lang.Class), void disposes(java.lang.Class), void disposesUnique(java.lang.Class), void named(java.lang.Class), void decorator(java.lang.Class), void delegate(java.lang.Class), void any(java.lang.Class), void newQualifier(), void defaultQualifier(java.lang.Class), void injectableClassType(java.util.List,java.lang.Class,java.lang.String), void providedConceptJeeInjectable(java.lang.Class[],java.lang.Class[])

column.name: TestMethods
column.value: void eventProducerConcept(java.lang.Class), void testInvalid_EventProducer_Concept(), void eventConsumerConcept(java.lang.Class), void testInvalid_EventConsumer_Concept()

column.name: TestMethods
column.value: void interceptor(java.lang.Class), void providedConceptInjectable(java.lang.Class), void interceptorBinding(java.lang.Class), void activatedInterceptor(java.lang.String,java.lang.Class), void inactiveInterceptor()

column.name: TestMethods
column.value: void entity(java.lang.Class), void embeddable(java.lang.Class), void embedded(java.lang.Class), void embeddedId(java.lang.Class), void namedQueries(java.lang.Class,java.lang.Class,java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String), void namedQueryUniqueDifferentQuery(java.lang.Class,java.lang.Class,java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String), void namedQueryUniqueSameQuery(java.lang.Class,java.lang.Class,java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String), void namedQueryUniqueWithoutQuery(java.lang.Class,java.lang.Class,java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String), void fullPersistenceDescriptorV20(java.lang.Class), void fullPersistenceDescriptorV21(java.lang.Class), void fullPersistenceDescriptorV32(java.lang.Class), void minimalPersistenceDescriptorV20(java.lang.Class), void minimalPersistenceDescriptorV21(java.lang.Class), void fullPersistenceUnitDescriptorV20(), void fullPersistenceUnitDescriptorV21(), void fullPersistenceUnitDescriptorV32(), void validationModeNotSpecifiedV20(java.lang.Class), void validationModeNotSpecifiedV21(java.lang.Class), void validationModeAutoV20(java.lang.Class), void validationModeAutoV21(java.lang.Class), void validationModeAutoV32(java.lang.Class), void validationModeSpecifiedV20(java.lang.Class), void validationModeSpecifiedV21(java.lang.Class)

column.name: TestMethods

column.name: TestMethods
column.value: void pathType(java.lang.Class), void pathMethod(java.lang.Class), void providedConceptInjectablePathType(java.lang.Class), void providedConceptInjectablePathMethod(java.lang.Class)

column.name: TestMethods
column.value: void transactionMethodsWithAdditionalConfigurationMustNotBeCalledDirectlyWithViolations(java.lang.Class), void transactionalMethodMustNotBeInvokedFromSameClassSimpleInheritanceJakarta(), void transactionalMethodMustNotBeInvokedFromSameClassSimpleInheritanceJavax(), void transactionalMethodMustNotBeInvokedFromSameClassGenericInheritanceJakarta(), void transactionalMethodMustNotBeInvokedFromSameClassGenericInheritanceJavax(), void transactionalMethodMustNotBeInvokedFromNestedClass(java.lang.Class)

column.name: TestMethods
column.value: void transactionMethodsMustNotBeCalledDirectlyWithViolations(java.lang.Class), void transactionalMethodMustNotBeInvokedFromSameClassSimpleInheritanceJakarta(), void transactionalMethodMustNotBeInvokedFromSameClassSimpleInheritanceJavax(), void transactionalMethodMustNotBeInvokedFromSameClassGenericInheritanceJakarta(), void transactionalMethodMustNotBeInvokedFromSameClassGenericInheritanceJavax(), void transactionalMethodMustNotBeInvokedFromNestedClass(java.lang.Class), void transactionalMethodMustNotBeInvokedFromNestedClassInSubClass(java.lang.Class), void nonTransactionalMethodCallingTransactionalMethod(java.lang.Class)

concept.description: Adds a label "IntegrationTest" to all non-abstract classes deriving from AbstractPluginIT or AbstractJavaPluginIT.

constraint.description: All integration test classes must have the name suffix "IT" for being executed using the Maven Failsafe Plugin.

concept.description: Labels all types annotated with "@org.neo4j.procedure.Procedure" with `Neo4j` and `Procedure`.
Labels jQAssistant plugin descriptor files with `jQAssistant` and `PluginDescriptor`.
Creates a `REGISTERS` relation between all procedure class elements of the jQAssistant plugin descriptor to the matching Java type.

constraint.description: Types declaring Neo4j procedures must be registered.

concept.description: Labels all types annotated with "@org.neo4j.procedure.UserFunction" with `Neo4j` and `UserFunction`.
Creates a `REGISTERS` relation between all function class elements of the jQAssistant plugin descriptor to the matching Java type.

constraint.description: Types declaring Neo4j user functions must be registered.
The jQAssistant XML Plugin descriptor ("/META-INF/jqassistant-plugin.xml") should provide a "version" attribute for its root element.

concept.description: Marks all generated classes with the label :Generated.
Labels types generated by Lombok as 'Generated' (requires 'lombok.addLombokGeneratedAnnotation=true' in 'lombok.config').
Reports the count of types labeled with `Generated`, grouped by containing artifact.

constraint.description: All package names used in a Maven project must start with the groupId.
